narrative:
Bethlehem township has 3,676 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points.
